account_characteristics: high Reels ratio (>70% of posts are video)
regular posting schedule (2‑4 times per week)
active story highlights for fashion, collaborations, lifestyle
bio includes bullet‑point format and emojis
bio_patterns: short tagline about style/fashion or personal vibe
location tag (city, e.g., Moscow, CIS region)
content_style: short‑form Reels showcasing outfits, hauls, styling tips
carousel/photo posts with detailed product shots
story highlights for behind‑the‑scenes and promos
UGC style product reviews and unboxings
caption_style: mix of Russian and occasional English phrases
heavy use of branded hashtags and call‑to‑action
personal storytelling combined with promotional tags
visual_style: clean, polished aesthetic with soft, natural lighting
neutral color palette (beige, white, gray, black) with accent colors (soft pink, burgundy, gold)
minimalist backgrounds (plain walls, simple indoor settings, urban streets)
occasional vintage texture (wood, wallpaper) for depth
fashion_style: classic, timeless pieces with feminine silhouettes
structured dresses, blazers, tailored trousers, skirts, coats
subtle prints, elegant fabrics, light layering
accessories such as gold jewelry, sleek bags, minimalist shoes
overall vibe of refined elegance and effortless chic
lifestyle_style: cozy home & decor moments (well‑lit rooms, minimal furnishings)
family or motherhood moments when relevant, kept elegant
brand_fit: travel & leisure brands targeting sophisticated female audience
